Sign In Sign Up Free
For MSPs & Agencies

DNS health reports your clients will actually read.

DNSSnuff Agency includes white-label PDF reporting, permanent shareable URLs, REST API access, and unlimited checks. Run professional DNS audits across your entire client base — under your own brand.

Start Free Trial → Contact Sales →

DNS problems cost your clients money. Catching them early costs you nothing.

DNS misconfiguration is responsible for a disproportionate share of email delivery failures, security incidents, and unexplained downtime.

Most of your clients have never had a DNS audit. Most have at least one critical misconfiguration they don't know about — a spoofable DMARC policy, a blacklist listing, a certificate about to expire, or a mail server that's been misconfigured since the original setup.

You can find all of it in 5 seconds, explain it in plain English, and deliver it as a branded report.

What MSPs get with Agency

White-label PDF reports

Every report generated under your account carries your logo and branding. Clients see your name, not DNSSnuff's. Deliver professional DNS health audits as part of your standard service — without building anything yourself.

Permanent shareable URLs

Agency plan reports never expire. Share a permanent link with any client — no DNSSnuff login required to view. Your branding, permanent access.

REST API + webhooks

Pull DNS health check data programmatically. Integrate into your PSA, RMM, or client reporting portal. Build custom dashboards. Automate the boring parts.

Unlimited domain checks

Check as many domains as you need, as often as you need. No per-check limits, no overages, no throttling on your client estate.

12-month report history

See a domain's health score over time. Demonstrate to clients that their DNS health has improved since you took over. Use historical data to correlate a delivery issue with a DNS change.

Daily scheduled checks + alerts

DNSSnuff monitors every domain in your dashboard every 24 hours. The moment anything changes — a new blacklist listing, an SPF update, an expiring certificate — you'll know before your client does.

How to use it with clients

Onboarding audit

Run a DNSSnuff report on every new client domain at onboarding. Identify quick wins — a DMARC policy upgrade, a missing DKIM record, a certificate renewal — that you can fix immediately. Start the relationship by finding something useful on day one.

Quarterly DNS review

Deliver a branded DNS health report to each client every quarter. Show the current score, what changed, and what you've fixed. This is a five-minute conversation that demonstrates ongoing value.

Pre-migration check

Before any infrastructure migration — email platform change, hosting move, new SSL certificate — run a before-and-after report. Have a documented baseline. Have a documented confirmation that the migration succeeded.

Business development

Run a free DNSSnuff report on a prospect's domain before a sales meeting. Walk in with specific findings — a spoofable DMARC policy, an active blacklist listing, an expiring certificate. Convert a generic pitch into concrete findings.

Example report findings

These are representative — not specific to any named domain.

Critical
DMARC policy not enforced

DMARC is set to p=none. Your client's domain can be spoofed by anyone. Changing to p=reject takes 2 minutes and eliminates the risk entirely.

Warning
SPF softfail

SPF is using ~all instead of -all. Unauthorised senders can deliver email from this domain that some recipients will accept. A one-line SPF update fixes this.

Notice
SSL certificate expiring in 14 days

The certificate for mail.clientdomain.com expires in 14 days. Browser warnings will follow. Renewal should be scheduled immediately.

Critical
Active blacklist listing

The mail server IP 203.0.113.47 is listed on Spamhaus PBL. Email from this domain is being blocked or deferred by a significant proportion of receiving mail servers.

Agency — $49/month

Monthly billing. Or $490/year (equivalent to $40.83/mo — saves 17%).

One Agency subscription covers your entire client dashboard. White-label reporting included at no extra charge. For large client estates or custom requirements, contact us.

Start Free Trial →

No card required to start. Cancel any time.
